SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller

Class GlobalExceptionHandler

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller.GlobalExceptionHandler
@RestControllerAdvice public class GlobalExceptionHandler extends Object
Global exception handler for REST controllers. Maps exceptions to appropriate HTTP status codes.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    Simple response payload for error messages returned by this handler.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleAccessDenied(AccessDeniedException ex)
    Handles access denied exceptions.
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleBadRequest(Exception ex)
    Handles bad request exceptions.
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleConflict(Exception ex)
    Handles conflict exceptions (duplicate types, states, deleting in-use resources, etc.).
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleConstraintViolation(jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolationException ex)
    Handles Bean Validation failures (e.g., invalid ReportLocation).
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleConversionFailed(ConversionFailedException ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Handles low-level conversion failures that may not surface as a MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException.
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleHttpMediaTypeNotSupported(HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException ex)
    Handles requests with unsupported media/content types.
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleHttpMessageNotReadable(HttpMessageNotReadableException ex)
    Handles malformed/invalid request bodies (e.g., JSON parse errors) as a client error, not a 500.
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleInternalError(Exception ex)
    Handles all other unhandled exceptions.
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleMethodArgumentTypeMismatch(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException ex)
    Handles path/query parameter conversion failures (e.g., invalid UUID, invalid int).
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleMissingServletRequestPart(MissingServletRequestPartException ex)
    Handles multipart/form-data requests missing a required part (e.g., missing "file" upload).
    GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
    handleNotFound(Exception ex)
    Handles resource not found exceptions.

      public GlobalExceptionHandler()

  • Method Details

    • handleNotFound

      @ExceptionHandler({ResourceNotFoundException.class,java.util.NoSuchElementException.class,jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException.class}) @ResponseStatus(NOT_FOUND) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleNotFound(Exception ex)
      Handles resource not found exceptions.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleAccessDenied

      @ExceptionHandler(AccessDeniedException.class) @ResponseStatus(FORBIDDEN) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleAccessDenied(AccessDeniedException ex)
      Handles access denied exceptions.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleBadRequest

      @ExceptionHandler({java.lang.IllegalArgumentException.class,BadRequestException.class}) @ResponseStatus(BAD_REQUEST) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleBadRequest(Exception ex)
      Handles bad request exceptions.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleConstraintViolation

      @ExceptionHandler(jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolationException.class) @ResponseStatus(BAD_REQUEST) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleConstraintViolation(jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolationException ex)
      Handles Bean Validation failures (e.g., invalid ReportLocation).
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleMethodArgumentTypeMismatch

      @ExceptionHandler(org.springframework.web.method.annotation.MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException.class) @ResponseStatus(BAD_REQUEST) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleMethodArgumentTypeMismatch(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException ex)
      Handles path/query parameter conversion failures (e.g., invalid UUID, invalid int).
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleConversionFailed

      @ExceptionHandler(org.springframework.core.convert.ConversionFailedException.class) @ResponseStatus(BAD_REQUEST) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleConversionFailed(ConversionFailedException ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Handles low-level conversion failures that may not surface as a MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      request - HTTP request associated with the failure.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleHttpMessageNotReadable

      @ExceptionHandler(org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException.class) @ResponseStatus(BAD_REQUEST) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleHttpMessageNotReadable(HttpMessageNotReadableException ex)
      Handles malformed/invalid request bodies (e.g., JSON parse errors) as a client error, not a 500.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleMissingServletRequestPart

      @ExceptionHandler(org.springframework.web.multipart.support.MissingServletRequestPartException.class) @ResponseStatus(BAD_REQUEST) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleMissingServletRequestPart(MissingServletRequestPartException ex)
      Handles multipart/form-data requests missing a required part (e.g., missing "file" upload).
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleHttpMediaTypeNotSupported

      @ExceptionHandler(org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException.class) @ResponseStatus(UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleHttpMediaTypeNotSupported(HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException ex)
      Handles requests with unsupported media/content types.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleConflict

      @ExceptionHandler({ConflictException.class,java.lang.IllegalStateException.class}) @ResponseStatus(CONFLICT) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleConflict(Exception ex)
      Handles conflict exceptions (duplicate types, states, deleting in-use resources, etc.).
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.

    • handleInternalError

      @ExceptionHandler(java.lang.Exception.class) @ResponseStatus(INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR) public GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse handleInternalError(Exception ex)
      Handles all other unhandled exceptions.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception being handled.
      Returns:
      error response payload.
